---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AI Agent Guard
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see. One sentence is ideal.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case or pain point.

> Example: "When Claude Code runs a shell command, I have no way to see what environment variables are passed. This makes it hard to detect potential data exfiltration."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as you can about the desired behavior, UI changes, or configuration options.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

- Is this related to a specific security rule or category?
- Would this require a new Tauri capability or permission?
- Are there existing tools or projects that implement something similar?

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots that help illustrate the feature.

---

> **Note on Security Rules**: If you are requesting a new built-in security rule
> (e.g., to detect a new class of dangerous Claude Code actions), please use the
> label `rule:request` in addition to `enhancement`. Describe the specific pattern
> or behavior the rule should detect.
